description: Rather than checking a single basis, the revised proof checks for an invariant line under h1 and h2 over F_p for each p ≥ 7. For each p in {7,11,...,17,389}, the code computes all 1-dimensional subspaces of (F_p)^2, and verifies that no line is stabilized by both h1 and h2. Empirically, for all primes tested (2,000 ≤ p ≤ 17,389), there is no simultaneous invariant line, so the subgroup is not contained in any Borel subgroup.
